channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Climbers found dead in Italian Alps a week after going missing
item.description: Authorities said the two climbers had not been heard from since leaving a mountain refuge on July 9.

item.title: Iran live updates: Iran strikes Bahrain and Jordan following US attacks, officials report
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, involving large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Watch: Internet helps make airport love connection
item.description: ABC News' Sophie Flay reports on a woman who used the internet to find the man who caught her eye on a flight to Florida.

item.title: Oil prices surge as Trump suggests U.S. fees on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Trump's statement that the U.S. will control the Strait of Hormuz and charge fees on cargo has driven oil prices higher for a second day.
